title: sanger-tol/busco pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

fasta.description: Assembly FASTA path or URL (.fa/.fasta, optionally .gz).
fasta.errorMessage: Assembly path is required and must not contain whitespace.

taxid.description: NCBI taxid for this assembly. Required when this row uses mode latest or ancestral. Defaults to global --taxid if empty.

mode.description: Lineage selection mode(s) for this assembly: basal, latest, ancestral (comma-separated). Defaults to global --mode if empty.

lineage.description: Additional explicit lineage name(s) to add (comma-separated). Defaults to global --lineage if empty.

outdir.errorMessage: Output directory must not contain whitespace. Relative values are created under global --outdir.
